metadata.description: Skills for driving coding CLIs headlessly as delegated agents

plugins.name: headless-clis
plugins.description: Drive coding CLIs (OpenAI Codex, Claude Code, xAI Grok, Google Antigravity) in headless/print mode — delegate a task, get a cross-vendor second opinion, or produce structured output for scripts. Each skill documents that CLI's real headless invocation, permission model, output shape, and model/effort support, verified empirically.
